# Interface: BrowserOpenOptions

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:62](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L62)

Per-visit options forwarded to the browser context.

## Properties

### baseUrl

```ts
baseUrl: string;
```

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:67](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L67)

Base URL of the site under test — the origin `goto()` resolves against
and the boundary of the `external` policy.

***

### external

```ts
external: "allow" | "block";
```

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:73](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L73)

Cross-origin request policy. `'block'` aborts every request leaving
the site under test (analytics, CDNs) — the browser-side analog of
strict intercepts. `'allow'` lets them through (deployed-site mode).

***

### headers?

```ts
optional headers?: Record<string, string>;
```

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:75](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L75)

Extra HTTP headers sent with every request of the visit (incl. User-Agent overrides).

***

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:77](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L77)
